write a letter to principal for taking leave 2 days

Okay, here’s a draft letter you can adapt:

[Your Name]
[Your Class]

Dear Principal [Principal’s Last Name],

I am writing to request a leave of absence from school for two days, on [Start Date] and [End Date]. [Briefly state reason for leave - e.g., due to a family matter/personal reasons].

I will ensure that I catch up on any missed coursework upon my return.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

Would you like me to format this letter with a more formal tone or perhaps include a specific reason for your leave? I can also search for examples of leave letters online.
